message.content:
Test file: src/claim-office.spec.ts
Failing test: "cursed sword (steel, enchantment 3), 0 years, first quote — premium 165 G"
Expected: 165
Current error: Expected {premium:165}, received {premium:115}
Implementation file: src/claim-office.ts

Add cursed surcharge: if item.cursed, add 50% of item's base premium to policy base. Spec formula: item-specific modifiers add to the item base premium; the item-modified-base sums become the policy base; policy-wide modifiers apply to the sum-of-unmodified-item-bases (policy base premium).

Per the spec: "item-specific modifiers (cursed, high enchantment) apply to the base premium of the affected item; policy-wide modifiers (loyalty, first insurance, follow-up contract) apply to the policy base premium (the sum of all item base premiums)"

So:
- policyBase = sum of item base premiums (unmodified) + block adjustments
- itemSurcharges = sum of curse and high-enchantment surcharges per item
- policyWide = first-insurance (10% of policyBase) etc.
- premium = ceil(policyBase + itemSurcharges + policyWide + fee)

For cursed sword: 100 + 50 + 10 + 5 = 165. ✓

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to Refactor after completion.

content.text: I'll analyze the failing test and implement the minimal code to make it pass.
I acknowledge the available skills but they are not relevant to this Green phase task. Let me implement the minimal code for the cursed surcharge.

content.text:
All 12 tests pass.

Green Phase Complete:
**Implementation**: Added optional `material`, `enchantment`, `cursed` fields to `ItemSpec`; added `CURSE_SURCHARGE_RATE = 0.5`; added `itemSurchargeFor` (returns 50% of item base premium when cursed, 0 otherwise) and `sumItemSurcharges`; updated `quote` to add item-specific surcharges separately from the policy base, so first-insurance still applies only to the unmodified policy base.
**Result**: All tests now pass (12 passing, 34 todo).
**Approach**: Minimal — only the cursed branch is implemented (no high-enchantment logic yet). First-insurance is computed on `policyBasePremium` (sum of item base premiums + block adjustment), keeping policy-wide modifier scope correct per spec. For cursed sword: 100 base + 50 curse + 10 first-insurance + 5 fee = 165 G.

Proceeding to Refactor phase.
